attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water or Fighting Energy attached to Quagsire but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Scorching Swipe

power.name: Aqua Boost

power.name: Growing Shadows

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

power.name: Call a Friend

attacks.name: Dual Bolt
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. If Pichu is on your Bench, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Milk Drink

attacks.name: Rollout
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If tails, Miltank does 20 damage to itself.

power.name: Steel Plating
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Metal Energy attached to Skarmory. If you do, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Skarmory during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Steel Plating
power.text: As long as Lairon is your Active Pokémon, all Metal type Pokémon on your Bench take 20 less damage from your opponent's attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Metal Charge
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to Lairon.

power.name: Foreshadow
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Faint Attack

power.name: Foreshadow
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Pokémon is now Confused.

power.name: Desert Veil

attacks.name: Heat Burst
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Fire Energy attached to Magmar. This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Water Energy card from your hand. If you do, discard 1 Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Overpowering Fang

power.name: Hot Soul

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.

If you do, move 2 damage counters from that Pokémon to Styn's Hitmonlee ★. This power can't be used if Styn's Hitmonlee ★ is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Perfect Counter
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Styn's Hitmonlee ★. If Styn's Hitmonlee ★ has exactly 4 damage counters on it, this attack does 100 damage instead.

attacks.text: This attack's damage is not affected by Resistance.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

power.name: Soaring Thunder

attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. If all of them are tails, Zapdos ★ does 20 damage to itself.

name: Energy Search
text: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Professor Birch
text: Draw cards from your deck until you have 6 cards in your hand.

name: PokéNav
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck, and choose a Basic Pokémon, Evolution card, or Energy card. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Put the 2 other cards back on top of your deck in any order.

name: Poké Ball
text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Energy Removal 2
text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and discard it.

name: Energy Restore
text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand. If you don't have that many basic Energy cards in your discard pile, put all of them into your hand.

name: Energy Switch
text: Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Double Rainbow Energy
text: Double Rainbow Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). While in play, Double Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides 2 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.) Damage done to your opponent's Pokémon by the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance). When the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is no longer an Evolved Pokémon, discard Double Rainbow Energy.

name: Metal Energy
text: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Darkness Energy
text: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

power.name: Solid Stone
power.text: As long as Regirock ex has any Fighting Energy attached to it, Regirock ex has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Seismic Feedback
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hammer Arm
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Black Iron Coating
power.text: As long as Dark Registeel has any Darkness Energy attached to it, damage done to Dark Registeel by attacks is reduced by 20.

attacks.name: Corrosive Lockdown
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. As long as the Defending Pokémon remains Poisoned, it cannot retreat.

attacks.name: Shadow Crash
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 20 more damage.

power.name: Sacred Ice

attacks.name: Radiant Ice Beam
attacks.text: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a basic Energy card and put it into your hand. If you do, return an Energy card attached to Dragonair to your hand.

attacks.name: Dragon Twister
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

power.name: Dragon Navigation
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and put it on top of your deck. If you do, search your discard pile for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Dragonite ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Sky Judgment
attacks.text: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. This attack does 30 damage times the number of basic Energy cards you find there. Put those Energy cards into your hand. Discard the other cards.

attacks.name: Poison Horn
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Rage Horn
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Nidorino.

power.name: Poison Crown
power.text: Whenever 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from Poison between turns, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Royal Venom
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on the Defending Pokémon between turns.

attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Poisoned, discard all Energy cards attached to Nidoking ex. If you do, this attack does 120 damage instead of 60.

attacks.name: Nightmare Gate
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Asleep, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. If you do, the new Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Prize of Darkness
attacks.text: If your opponent has fewer Prize cards left than you, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Suggestion
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. Your opponent draws a card.

attacks.name: Pendulum Trance
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dream Tax
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Asleep, your opponent discards a card from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Kindle
attacks.text: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, search your discard pile for a Fire Energy card and put it into your hand.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

power.name: Magma Chamber
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose a Fire Energy card in your discard pile and attach it to Camerupt. If you do, put 2 damage counters on Camerupt. This power can't be used if Camerupt is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Volcanic Heave
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. This attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Fire Energy card you discarded.

attacks.name: Caldera
attacks.text: Camerupt does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Signal Search
attacks.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Choose a Water Energy card or a Lightning Energy card you find there and put it into your hand. Put the other cards back on top of your deck in any order.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

power.name: Deep Current
power.text: Each basic Water Energy card attached to Lanturn provides both Water Energy and Lightning Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

attacks.name: Blackwater Pulse
attacks.text: If Lanturn has both Water Energy and Lightning Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Abyssal Light
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. This attack does 50 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Cotton Shelter
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Swablu by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

power.name: Harmonize
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Altaria is your Active Pokémon and has 2 or more different types of basic Energy attached to it, you may remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Altaria is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Chorus Wing
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the number of different types of basic Energy attached to Altaria.

power.name: Static Fleece
power.text: If Mareep is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Mareep is Knocked Out), flip a coin. If heads, the Attacking Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Gather Light
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Lightning Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Charge Counter
attacks.text: Put 1 charge counter on Flaaffy.

attacks.name: Static Release
attacks.text: Remove all charge counters from Flaaffy. This attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage for each charge counter you removed.

power.name: Charge Beacon
power.text: Whenever you attach a Lightning Energy card from your hand to Ampharos ex, put 1 charge counter on Ampharos ex.

attacks.name: Signal Burst
attacks.text: Remove any number of charge counters from Ampharos ex. This attack does 20 damage for each charge counter you removed.

attacks.name: Blackout
attacks.text: Your opponent can't play any Stadium cards from his or her hand during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Sinkhole
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Your opponent switches that Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Sand Screen
power.text: As long as there is no Stadium card in play, prevent all effects of an attack, excluding damage, done to Vibrava.

attacks.name: Desert Signal
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sonic Dust
attacks.text: If there is a Stadium card in play, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

power.name: Desert Dominion
power.text: As long as Flygon ex is your Active Pokémon and there is a Stadium card in play, the Retreat Cost for each Defending Pokémon is Colorless more.

attacks.name: Sand Burial
attacks.text: You may discard a Stadium card in play. If you do, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Desert Storm
attacks.text: If there is no Stadium card in play, this attack does 70 damage plus 30 more damage.

power.name: Bent Space
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Palkia ex is on your Bench, you may switch Palkia ex with your Active Pokémon. If you do, your opponent chooses 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. This power can't be used if Palkia ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Spatial Crush
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 2 or more, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Rewind
attacks.text: Remove 3 damage counters from Dialga ex.

attacks.name: Ages of Ruin
attacks.text: Dialga ex can't use Ages of Ruin during your next turn.

power.name: Psychic Contamination
power.text: As long as Dark Mewtwo ex is your Active Pokémon, whenever your opponent attaches an Energy card from his or her hand to the Defending Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Mind Shatter
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Choose a card you find there and discard it.

attacks.name: Buried Alive
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Iron Grave
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out by this attack, discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

power.name: Ancient Slumber
power.text: As long as Relicanth ex is your Active Pokémon, whenever your opponent flips a coin between turns for his or her Asleep Pokémon, your opponent flips 2 coins instead of 1. If either of them is tails, that Pokémon is still Asleep.

attacks.name: Deep-sea Crush
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Asleep, this attack does 30 more damage. After doing damage, remove the Asleep Special Condition from the Defending Pokémon.

power.name: Crystal Type
power.text: Whenever you attach a Fighting, Water, or Metal Energy card from your hand to Regigigas, Regigigas's type becomes the same as that type of Energy until the end of the turn.

attacks.name: Titanic Slam
attacks.text: Discard a Fighting Energy card from Regigigas.

attacks.name: Giant Impact
attacks.text: If you have Registeel, Regirock and Regice in play, this attack's base damage is 110 instead of 80.

power.name: Overpowering Aura
power.text: Whenever you attach a Psychic or Darkness Energy card from your hand to Cipher's Lugia, put 1 damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shadow Storm
attacks.text: You may discard a Darkness Energy attached to Cipher's Lugia. If you do, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack also does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

power.name: Fortified Armor
power.text: Any damage done to Aggron by attacks from your opponent's Evolved Pokémon is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Iron Rampage
attacks.text: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Metal Pokémon.

power.name: Psychic Exchange
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Alakazam is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon. You can't add more than 60 damage in this way.

power.name: Shifting Melody
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move an Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon with Regirock, Regice, or Registeel in its name to Mew. If you do, Mew's type becomes the same as that Energy's type until the end of your turn. This power can't be used if Mew is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Relic Pulse
attacks.text: If Mew has Fighting, Water, and Metal Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Smoldering Bite
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Black Flame
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Dark Fang
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, your opponent discards a card from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Quick Search
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Trainer card (excluding Supporter cards and Stadium cards), show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dash Attack
attacks.text: You may switch Linoone with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

power.name: Final Stance
power.text: If Machamp would be Knocked Out by an opponent's attack, you may discard 2 Energy cards attached to Machamp. If you do, Machamp is not Knocked Out and its remaining HP becomes 10 instead.

attacks.name: Seismic Throw
attacks.text: Machamp does 20 damage to itself.

power.name: Polarity Field
power.text: Each basic Lightning Energy card attached to your Metal Pokémon provides Lightning Energy and Metal Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.)

attacks.name: Magnetic Pulse
attacks.text: You may move a basic Energy card attached to Magnezone to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

power.name: Royal Escort
power.text: The Retreat Cost for each of your Nidoran ♂, Nidoran ♀, Nidorino, Nidorina, Nidoking, and Nidoqueen is Colorless less.

attacks.name: Royal Command
attacks.text: If you have Nidoking in play, this attack does 40 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon named Nidoran ♂ or Nidoran ♀ and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

power.name: Family Care
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may remove 1 damage counter from 1 of your Nidoran ♂, Nidoran ♀, Nidorino, Nidorina, Nidoking, or Nidoqueen. This power can't be used if Nidorina is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

power.name: Night Watch
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Noctowl is your Active Pokémon, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck. This power can't be used if Noctowl is affected by a Special Condition.

power.name: Energy Rewrite
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose 1 Special Energy card attached to Porygon-Z. Then, choose a type. Until the end of your turn, that Energy card provides 1 Energy of that type instead of its usual type. This power can't be used if Porygon-Z is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Data Crash
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Special Energy card attached to Porygon-Z. You can't add more than 60 damage in this way.

power.name: Data Reorder
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order. This power can't be used if Porygon2 is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Signal Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

power.name: Voltage Link
power.text: As long as Pichu is on your Bench, Raichu's attacks do 10 more damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Chain Lightning
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Thunder Burst
attacks.text: Discard a Lightning Energy card attached to Raichu.

power.name: Dark Bargain
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Sableye is your Active Pokémon, you may discard a Darkness Energy card from your hand. If you do, search your discard pile for a Trainer card (excluding Supporter cards and Stadium cards), show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. This power can't be used if Sableye is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Shadow Sneak
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Gather Ice
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for up to 2 Water Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand.

power.name: Deep Sleep
power.text: As long as Snorlax is Asleep, any damage done to Snorlax by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Resting Press
attacks.text: Snorlax is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Defense Curl
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Spheal by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Frozen Hide
power.text: Any damage done to Walrein by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that has any Special Energy cards attached to it is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Frozen Current
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has 2 or more Energy attached to it, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Energy Recycle System
text: Search your discard pile for basic Energy cards. You may either show 1 basic Energy card to your opponent and put it into your hand, or show 3 basic Energy cards to your opponent and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Life Herb
text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). Remove all Special Conditions and 6 damage counters from that Pokémon (all if there are less than 6).

name: Mt. Moon
text: Any Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) with maximum HP less than 70 can't use any Poké-Powers.

name: Space Center
text: Ignore Poké-Bodies for all Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name).

name: Meteor Falls
text: Each player's Active Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) can use any attack from its Basic Pokémon or its Stage 1 Evolution card. (You still have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.)

name: Heal Energy
text: Heal Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditions from that Pokémon. If Heal Energy is attached to Pokémon-ex, Heal Energy has no effect other than providing Energy.
